title: Iran fires ballistic missile salvos at central, southern Israel on Jewish holiday
snippet: Iran fired ballistic missile salvos at central and southern Israel on a Jewish holiday. Part of escalating retaliatory cycle between Iran and Israel.
tag_reason: 이전 보고서에 없는 신규 세부사항: 유대교 공휴일 이스라엘 본토 탄도미사일 공격
